sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106784" key="u(pa/ggeltos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπάγγελτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n106784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">informed against,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
